message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.set_index (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.set_index:

- set_index_drop_true: 2-col frame, promote "id" to row index AND
  drop it from columns (default behavior)
- set_index_drop_false: 2-col frame, promote "key" to row index but
  keep it as a column too (drop=False)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.set_index(col, drop=...)), runs the Rust DataFrame.set_index
(col, drop), and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected.
DataFrameSetIndex was already wired through the Frame response branch;
this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-kft9z]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
